name: firstpr
description: Find a beginner-friendly GitHub issue, then get an AI mentor that teaches instead of hands you the fix.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && tsc -b client
